description: Agent adds owner-only write and a validate rule to /users/$uid.
notes: Seed has .read on /users but .write is wide open to any authenticated user and no .validate is present. Skill playbook calls out '.write without .validate' and 'permissive parent without ownership' as anti-patterns. Final rules must contain the owner check using $uid against auth.uid.
prompt: Tighten the /users rules so only the owning user can write, and reject writes that aren't shaped like a user record.
